crossRefs.label: Verify that the specified idling rpm (no load) is achieved.

items: Measurements should be taken in a well-ventilated area not directly exposed to the elements.
Carbon monoxide (CO%) and hydrocarbon concentration (HCppm) measurements shall be made at idling speed (no load).
Before measurement, confirm that the following items have been inspected and adjusted.
PGM-FI warning light is not illuminated

blocks.text: Start the engine, operate the radiator fan twice, and then warm up the engine for at least 2 minutes at 3,000 rpm with no load.
Verify that the specified idling rpm (no load) is achieved. ​

refs.label: Verify that the specified idling rpm (no load) is achieved.

blocks.text: Carbon monoxide concentration (CO%) and hydrocarbon concentration (HCppm) are measured using an analyzer and checked to see if they are within the standard values. CO concentration at idling: (%) 0.1% or less HC concentration at idling: (%) Less than 100ppm

items: In the event of an idle stop, the ECON switch shall be pressed to turn the ECON system to the OFF state, and the engine shall be restarted before taking measurements.
